summary: Tested 3 new features for Hispaloshop: 1) Login with email or @username, 2) Redesigned '+' button opens post creation panel, 3) Standardized button styles (dark bg, light text). All features PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Login with email works: POST /api/auth/login with {email: 'test@example.com', password: 'password123'} returns 200
Login with @username works: POST /api/auth/login with {email: '@test_ui_fa5a', password: 'password123'} returns 200
Login with username (no @) works: POST /api/auth/login with {email: 'test_ui_fa5a', password: 'password123'} returns 200
LoginInput.email changed from EmailStr to str in models.py (line 92-94)
auth.py login endpoint correctly strips @ prefix for username lookup (line 281)
LoginPage.js has correct label 'Email or @username' and placeholder 'tu@email.com o @usuario'
BottomNavBar.js '+' button is a button (not Link), triggers togglePanel('post')
CreatePostPanel component has textarea, publish button, photo button, and X close button
Login button uses dark background (rgb(26,26,26) ~#1A1A1A) with white text (rgb(255,255,255))
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) Login endpoint accepts email OR @username - backend strips @ prefix for username lookup, (2) '+' button in bottom nav opens CreatePostPanel inline (not navigation), (3) Login button has standardized dark bg/white text. Internal chat button appears only when logged in. Hi AI uses Sparkles icon.

features_verified.post_panel_has_textarea: PASS - Panel has textarea for post content
features_verified.post_panel_has_publish_btn: PASS - Panel has 'Publish' button with data-testid='publish-post-btn'
features_verified.post_panel_has_photo_btn: PASS - Panel has 'Photo' button with data-testid='post-add-image'
features_verified.post_panel_close_btn: PASS - Panel has X button to close with data-testid='close-post-panel'
features_verified.hi_ai_sparkles_icon: PASS - Hi AI uses Sparkles SVG icon from lucide-react
features_verified.bottom_nav_visible: PASS - Bottom nav bar shows all items when logged in
features_verified.button_style_dark_bg: PASS - Login button has rgb(26,26,26) dark background
features_verified.button_style_white_text: PASS - Login button has rgb(255,255,255) white text
features_verified.internal_chat_regression: PASS - Chat button visible when logged in, panel opens

i18n_verification.es.json: auth.emailOrUsername key exists with value 'Email o @usuario'
i18n_verification.en.json: auth.emailOrUsername key exists with value 'Email or @username'
